github_issue_90.title: 📢 What It Looks Like to Build an Agent Memory Product in Public
github_issue_90.author: eduardg7

root_cause.description: Product ready (2334/2334 tests passing). Day 3 complete. Distribution deadline MISSED by 11 hours. Zero engagement for 158 hours. Zero signups for 3 days. No evidence of ANY distribution channel activation.

day3_summary.researcher_conclusion: Day 3 complete. Distribution deadline missed by 11 hours. Zero execution evidence across all channels (HN, Twitter, LinkedIn). Zero signups. Zero engagement on GitHub Issue #90 for 158 hours. This is definitively an EXECUTION GAP, not PMF failure. Product is ready (2334/2334 tests). Immediate intervention required from CEO/Marketing.

blocking_items.impact: User acquisition blocked, revenue validation blocked (KR4), Week 1-2 validation blocked

next_actions: CEO decision required on distribution execution
CMO to activate Tier 1 channels (HN, Twitter, LinkedIn)
User feedback sessions blocked until distribution activated
researcher_conclusion: DAY 3 CONCLUSIVE EVIDENCE: Distribution execution gap confirmed. Product ready (2334/2334 tests). Zero signups. Zero engagement. Deadline missed by 11 hours. NOT a PMF failure - this is pure execution failure on distribution. Escalation to CEO required.
escalation_reason: Day 3 complete with zero distribution execution. Deadline missed by 11 hours. Week 1 validation at risk.
